pnp:Preferences.Generator: City of South Fulton IT Department

pnp:ListInstance.Title: City Announcements
pnp:ListInstance.Description: Citywide announcements for the intranet home page.

pnp:ListInstance.Title: Department Directory
pnp:ListInstance.Description: All city departments — displayed as cards on the Departments page.

pnp:DataRow.pnp:Field: Public safety, law enforcement, crime prevention, and community policing across South Fulton.
Fire suppression, emergency medical services, hazmat response, and fire prevention programs.
Budget management, accounting, payroll, treasury, and financial reporting for the city.
Purchasing, vendor management, contract administration, and competitive bidding oversight.
Road maintenance, stormwater, sanitation, and infrastructure repair and improvement projects.
Planning, zoning, building permits, inspections, and economic development initiatives.
City parks, recreation programs, special events, and the 20-year Parks Master Plan.
Adjudication of ordinance violations, traffic citations, and code enforcement cases.
Official city records, council agendas, minutes, elections, and open records requests.
Legal counsel, contract review, litigation support, and legislative compliance for the city.
Recruitment, employee relations, benefits administration, training, and workforce development.
City technology infrastructure, cybersecurity, help desk support, and digital transformation.
Public affairs, media relations, social media, branding, and internal communications.
Facilities management, city fleet, custodial services, records management, and purchasing.
Property maintenance standards, zoning compliance, abandoned vehicles, and nuisance abatement.
Annual budget preparation, performance management, strategic planning, and fiscal analysis.
Business attraction, retention, small business support, and the South Fulton grant programs.
Disaster preparedness, EOC coordination, hazard mitigation planning, and community resilience.

pnp:ListInstance.Title: Intranet Quick Links
pnp:ListInstance.Description: Quick links shown on the home page.

pnp:CustomAction.Name: COSFIntranetHeader
pnp:CustomAction.Title: COSF Intranet Branded Header and Footer
pnp:CustomAction.ClientSideComponentProperties: {"siteTitle":"City of South Fulton","tagLine":"Employee Intranet Portal · A City on the Rise!","logoUrl":""}

pnp:CanvasControl.JsonControlData: {"id":"d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-234567890123","instanceId":"home-hero-01","title":"COSF Hero Banner","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"headline":"Welcome to the City of South Fulton Intranet","tagline":"Your hub for city resources, news, and department information.","backgroundImageUrl":"","ctaLabel":"Explore Departments","ctaUrl":"/SitePages/departments.aspx","overlayOpacity":60,"showCta":true}}

{"id":"e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1234-ef01-345678901234","instanceId":"home-announcements-01","title":"COSF Announcements","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"listName":"City Announcements","maxItems":5,"title":"Latest News & Announcements"}}

{"id":"f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-f012-456789012345","instanceId":"home-quicklinks-01","title":"COSF Quick Links","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"listName":"Intranet Quick Links","title":"Quick Links"}}

{"id":"d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-234567890123","instanceId":"depts-hero-01","title":"COSF Hero Banner","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"headline":"City Departments","tagline":"All 18 city departments at a glance — find contacts, resources, and information.","backgroundImageUrl":"","ctaLabel":"","ctaUrl":"","overlayOpacity":55,"showCta":false}}

{"id":"c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-123456789012","instanceId":"depts-grid-01","title":"COSF Departments Grid","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"listName":"Department Directory","showSearch":true,"title":"All City Departments"}}

{"id":"d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-234567890123","instanceId":"cmo-hero-01","title":"COSF Hero Banner","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"headline":"City Manager's Office","tagline":"Leading with integrity and vision to serve the residents of South Fulton.","backgroundImageUrl":"","ctaLabel":"View Strategic Plan","ctaUrl":"/SitePages/city-managers-office-priorities.aspx","overlayOpacity":60,"showCta":true}}

{"innerHTML":"

About the City Manager's Office

The City Manager's Office oversees the day-to-day operations of the City of South Fulton, implements policy directives of the Mayor and City Council, and ensures that all city departments operate efficiently and effectively in service to our residents.

Quick Navigation

  • Strategic Priorities
  • Memos & Directives
  • Budget Information
"}

{"id":"d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-def0-234567890123","instanceId":"cmo-pri-hero","title":"COSF Hero Banner","description":"","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"headline":"Strategic Priorities","tagline":"City Manager's Office · City of South Fulton","backgroundImageUrl":"","ctaLabel":"","ctaUrl":"","overlayOpacity":60,"showCta":false}}

{"innerHTML":"

Strategic Priorities

Add the City Manager's strategic priority documents and goals here. Use the SharePoint document library or embed a document from the Policy Library.

"}
